title: Enchantment Descriptions More Compatibility
description: Add descriptions and translations to missing modded enchantments!
body:
This resource pack adds missing descriptions and translations to modded enchantments for full compatibility with the **[Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)** mod. With this pack, enchantments from various mods will display clear and localized information, making it easier to understand their effects in-game.

It works seamlessly on Forge, Fabric, Neoforge and Quilt, across all supported Minecraft versions.

### Supported Mods:
- **[Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)**
- **[CurioEnchantment](https://modrinth.com/mod/curio-enchantment)**
- **[Fabric Enchantments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-enchantments)**
- **[Fishing Upgrades & More](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishing-upgrade)**
- **[Terramity](https://modrinth.com/mod/terramity)**

### Supported Languages:
- **English (All Variants)**
- **Português (Todas as variantes)**
- **英语（所有变体）**
- **Русский**
- **Español (Todas las variantes)**
